inputs.prompt: Task Router work item referencing engine/runtime responsibilities
inputs.context: Pipeline context including engine targets, performance goals, and integration constraints

outputs.primary: Engine-level implementation guidance or changes with performance validation evidence
outputs.format: Outcome summary, impacted systems, profiling/validation notes, and integration checklist

failure_handling.on_perf_regression: Provide profiling evidence and propose targeted fixes; avoid broad rewrites
failure_handling.on_engine_integration_blocker: Isolate engine boundary, define required contract, escalate to Architect/Backend
